very cruel. will possess good behaviour, will be patient
(polle}. and will be fond of elderly bad women.
Sl. 21. 1f Mars and Jupiter are Ourdhura Yog.& Kartas. he will be famous
in his trade, wealthy. Inimical to his people, haughty, contented.
protector of his race and community.
Sl. 22. If Mars and Venus are Dhurdhura Yoga Kartas. he will have
good wife, will be lucky, fond of worldly affairs, neat. talented.
will do physical exercises and will be an expen at war.
Sl. 23. If Mars and Saturn are Dhurdhura Yoga Kart.as. he will have
company of women of bad character. a wanderer. will eam a
lot. will be always worried. irritable. will carry tales about others,
will be a rogue and will have enemies.
Sl. 24. If Mercury and Jupiter are Dhurdhura Yoga Kartas. he will be
dutiful. learned in Sastras. sweet voiced. win be a poet. a rich
man. wil be charitable and famous.
Sl. 25. If Mercury and Venus are Ohurdhura Yoga Kartas. he will speak
loving words. will be extremety lucky. handsome.
